name: the-complete-guide-to-breast-cancer
description: Trisha Greenhalgh and Liz O'Riordan's 'The Complete Guide to Breast Cancer: How to Feel Empowered and Take Control' — a practical, compassionate guide written by two doctors who have both had breast cancer. Covers diagnosis, surgery, chemotherapy, radiotherapy, hormone therapy, body image, relationships, survivorship, and secondary cancer.
